_comment: Demo ROMs (homebrew built by the llvm-mos-65816 +mos-a16 toolchain) and their in-browser fidelity self-checks. A selfcheck mirrors the gate's headless dev/jgxcheck.cpp assert exactly: power on, run `frames` frames, read `len` little-endian bytes of WRAM at `off`, require == `want`. Matching values prove this wasm build is byte-for-byte the core the gate trusts.
